title: 'Cards before Coffins' returns due to popular demand
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - After a sold-out success in August, the Karoo Homeschool Theatre Company is set to return to the Rupert Theatre stage in Graaff-Reinet with its Western production, Cards before Coffins.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - After a sold-out success in August, the Karoo Homeschool Theatre Company is set to return to the Rupert Theatre stage in Graaff-Reinet with its Western production, Cards before Coffins."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Wild West","html":"Wild West"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Set in a dusty frontier town where outlaws and gold thieves test their luck, the play delivers a mix of suspense, humour and high-stakes drama."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The production showcases the work of the Karoo Homeschool Theatre Company’s drama students, transporting audiences into the Wild West through a range of beautifully hand-crafted sets by Iain North and props by Imé van Aarde, supported by a storyline that keeps the tension alive.","html":"The production showcases the work of the Karoo Homeschool Theatre Company’s drama students, transporting audiences into the Wild West through a range of beautifully hand-crafted sets by Iain North and props by Imé van Aarde, supported by a storyline that keeps the tension alive."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Enthusiastic reviews","html":"Enthusiastic reviews"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The first run of Cards before Coffins in August drew enthusiastic reviews from local audiences, who praised the cast’s energy, the engaging script, and the unforgettable shadow puppet scene.","html":"The first run of Cards before Coffins in August drew enthusiastic reviews from local audiences, who praised the cast’s energy, the engaging script, and the unforgettable shadow puppet scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“What an extraordinary privilege to work with such a talented group of young people in a collaborative process that has resulted in a funny, playful, joyous expression of creativity,” drama teacher and director Paula Kingwill proudly stated.","html":"“What an extraordinary privilege to work with such a talented group of young people in a collaborative process that has resulted in a funny, playful, joyous expression of creativity,” drama teacher and director Paula Kingwill proudly stated."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Details","html":"Details"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The production will return to the Rupert Theatre at the end of October, giving residents another opportunity to experience this homegrown theatrical success.","html":"The production will return to the Rupert Theatre at the end of October, giving residents another opportunity to experience this homegrown theatrical success."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Date: Thursday 30 October at 18:30 and Friday 31 October at 14:30Venue: Rupert Theatre in Graaff- ReinetAddress: 23 Parsonage Street, Graaff-Reinet","html":"Date: Thursday 30 October at 18:30 and Friday 31 October at 14:30
Venue: Rupert Theatre in Graaff- Reinet
Address: 23 Parsonage Street, Graaff-Reinet"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tickets can be pre-booked by sending a WhatsApp to Paula Kingwill on 073 169 2716 and will also be available at the door of the theatre for the public to purchase.","html":"Tickets can be pre-booked by sending a WhatsApp to Paula Kingwill on 073 169 2716 and will also be available at the door of the theatre for the public to purchase."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Seats are limited, so audiences are encouraged to come early or prebook to avoid missing out on a performance that includes gun-slinging action, an epic piano battle, and poker time!","html":"Seats are limited, so audiences are encouraged to come early or prebook to avoid missing out on a performance that includes gun-slinging action, an epic piano battle, and poker time!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
